name: San Francisco Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all seasoning mix ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Heat the oil in a 12-inch skillet over high heat until very hot (about 4 minutes).
3. Add the rice, spaghetti, onions, celery, butter, and 3 Tbsp of the seasoning mix to the hot oil.
4. Stir well and cook, shaking the pan occasionally, until the rice and spaghetti are golden brown (about 6 minutes).
5. Add the sesame seeds and the remaining seasoning mix; stir well and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Add the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until the rice and spaghetti are browned (about 3 to 5 minutes).
7. Stir in the parsley and chicken stock, cover the skillet, and bring to a boil over high heat.
8. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 12 minutes.
9. Remove from the heat and let the skillet sit, covered, for an additional 8 minutes.
This is a great dinner side dish to accompany almost any kind of meat, poultry, or fish. It can also be served with a salad as a lunch option.
